memory.summary: My teammate is asking me to take over their part due to an emergency, despite my plan to finish only my own share this afternoon.
My teammate is asking me to take over their work, which conflicts with my plan to finish only my own share today.
My teammate dumped their work on me, increasing my load to 0.14 while I only planned to do 0.12.
I have worked for 1.5 hours on my share, but the deadline is in under an hour and I still haven't finished.
I missed my own deadline, and the teammate's unfinished work also expired at 19:00. I now have two overdue tasks with low progress while being exhausted.
I worked 1.5 hours to move my progress from 0.62 to 0.67, but I still haven't finished the overdue task despite having high energy.
Taking on my teammate's share increased my load significantly, compounding the stress of already missing both our deadlines.
I advanced my project share slightly, but with zero energy and high stress, continuing to work on overdue tasks is unsustainable.
I cannot find the overdue task 'assignment_A' to work on, yet my energy is depleted and stress remains critically high.
Working 2 hours advanced my project share slightly, yet my zero energy and high stress make this unsustainable.
I cannot find 'assignment_A' to work on, and my zero energy combined with high stress confirms that pushing further is impossible.
I advanced my group project slightly, but working while energy is zero and stress remains critical confirms I cannot sustain this pace.

agent.last_reasoning: Finishing my own share (82% done) is the highest priority to clear work before Monday. I have energy to spare, and completing this first reduces total remaining load. Dealing with the teammate's dumped task can wait until after I secure my own deadline.
